## Problem

What practical problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Why it matters

Explain why this would improve the system in a meaningful way.

## Notes

Please prefer requests that improve:
- robustness
- resumability
- clarity
- subtitle-driven workflow
